title: Squirrel Removal in Edison, NJ
metaDescription: Expert squirrel removal services in Edison, NJ. Licensed wildlife control specialists serving Edison homes and businesses. Safe, humane removal $900-$2,500. Call today!
intro: Squirrels invading your Edison property can cause significant damage to attics, wiring, and insulation. Our professional squirrel removal services in Edison, NJ provide safe, humane, and effective solutions to protect your home or business from these persistent pests. With prices ranging from $900 to $2,500, we offer comprehensive removal and exclusion services tailored to your property's specific needs.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings years of wildlife management expertise to Edison residents, combining humane removal techniques with guaranteed exclusion methods. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of squirrel infestations in New Jersey properties and provide fast, reliable service with transparent pricing and long-term prevention strategies.
localContext: Edison's mix of residential neighborhoods near Roosevelt Park and commercial properties along Route 1 creates ideal habitats for squirrels seeking shelter in attics and crawl spaces. The mature trees throughout areas like Menlo Park and Clara Barton provide easy access points to rooflines, making professional exclusion services essential for protecting your Edison property.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Edison, NJ?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Edison typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, the number of entry points, and the extent of exclusion work needed. Our technicians provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Edison home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic or walls, especially during early morning or evening hours, visible damage to soffits or roof vents, chewed wiring or insulation, and droppings in your attic space. You may also notice squirrels entering and exiting through gaps in your roofline.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, ethical removal methods that comply with New Jersey wildlife regulations. Our approach includes live trapping and relocation when appropriate, one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter, and thorough sealing of entry points to prevent future infestations.

faqs.question: How long does the squirrel removal process take in Edison?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Edison are completed within 3-7 days, though complex infestations may take longer. The timeline depends on the number of squirrels, accessibility of entry points, and extent of damage repair needed. We'll provide a clear timeline during your initial inspection and keep you updated throughout the process.
